positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration featuring a detailed portrait of a wise owl perched on a branch, surrounded by swirling bioluminescent flora. The style is inspired by Art Nouveau and geometric patterns, combining deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and warm gold accents. The owl has striking, intelligent eyes and a majestic silhouette. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for a print repeat pattern. Use clean linework, strong graphic contrast, and a flat, vector-like depth. Studio lighting, clean background isolation, high contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for a t-shirt design.
negative: photorealistic, blur, low detail, noise, watermark, text, signature, grainy, bad anatomy, cartoon, anime, distorted, multiple limbs, messy, cluttered background
